message:
Implement use_last degradation policy (rust_proxy-tkj)

Add get_last_healthy_proxy() method to StateStore that finds the proxy
with the most recent last_healthy timestamp.

Add use_last_proxy() function that attempts to connect through the most
recently healthy proxy, falling back to try_all policy if it fails.

Integrate UseLast case into the degradation policy match in
handle_connection_with_load_balancing.

Also includes formatting fixes via cargo fmt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
